failure_movement.justification: Unknown shrinkage direction correct (predicted -2 to -4, actual -7: larger than claimed but same direction). Wrong-rise direction mentioned (predicted 0-1, actual +3: magnitude severely underestimated). Empty predicted flat but rose +1. Correct +3 matches the overall gain range. Direction right on all clusters, magnitudes mostly off.

trace_movement.justification: Prompt tokens predicted roughly unchanged (actual +4.9, confirmed). Completion tokens predicted to tick up slightly (actual +30.7, ~15% rise — directionally correct but understated). Fewer unknown-ending traces confirmed (-7 unknown cluster). Expanded sentence windows for list questions unverifiable from tokens alone, so partial credit only.

side_effects.justification: Correctly flagged unknown->wrong conversion risk (5025383b, gpt4_31ff4165 confirmed). Completion token rise predicted and confirmed. Prompt token stability correctly predicted. However, 3 previously correct tasks regressed to empty (8cf51dda, 982b5123, gpt4_21adecb5), a regression not flagged. Partial credit for the correct risk call.
